## L-NNN — Short title describing the pattern

**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**From:** T-NNN, S-NNN, [optional link to source]
**Lesson:** One or two paragraphs. What happened, why it was non-obvious, and what the general pattern is. Write for a reader who has not seen the original bug. Name the specific failure mode, not just the symptom.
**Rule:** One sentence. The actionable takeaway. Should be checkable — "whenever you X, do Y" or "never Z without W."

---
